Cleared-tissue light-sheet microscope · high resolution

Learn about Cleared-Tissue Light Sheet · 2 — High Res

A detailed walk-around of the high-res build. Start at the wide front view (the two laptops and the monitor), then use the view bar to move around the setup. Hover a labeled part for its name; click for a call-out. First pass — positions and labels come straight from the CTLSM2 slides; some descriptions still need filling in.

Hover a labeled part, then click it.

High-res companion to the low-res interactive microscope. Views and targeting from CTLSM2.pptx.
